positive_prompts.default: your positive prompt here. you are using the default presets list. update it in comfyui/custom_nodes/comfyui-rubytools/nodes/presets.json
positive_prompts.anime: illustration, digital art, anime, high quality,
positive_prompts.rubys_avatar: 1girl, solo, long hair, looking at viewer, smile, bangs, blue eyes, simple background, hair ornament, dress, bow, cleavage, bare shoulders, jewelry, upper body, red hair, earrings, detached sleeves, grin, blue bow, oversized bow, princess, magical

negative_prompts.default: your negative prompt here. I would suggest not using these defaults. These are not what I use.
negative_prompts.anime: bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digits, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality
negative_prompts.no_digital: illustration, painting, drawing, art, sketch, cartoon, anime, 3d render

styles.default: you can use the same name under different categories, but there can only be one of each category. Make sure you don't forget commas after lines
styles.cinematic: cinematic lighting, dramatic lighting, film grain, movie still, depth of field
styles.anime: anime style, cel shaded, vibrant colors, clean lines, anime screencap
styles.photorealistic: photorealistic, 8k uhd, highly detailed, sharp focus, professional photography
styles.oil_painting: oil painting, painterly, brush strokes, canvas texture, classical art
styles.watercolor: watercolor painting, soft edges, translucent colors, wet on wet
styles.concept_art: concept art, digital painting, artstation, trending on artstation

custom.example: your custom preset here - edit presets.json in your comfyui/custom_nodes/comfyui-rubytools/nodes/presets.json folder to add more
